# Model Selection Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must produce a model decision, routing plan, or downstream implementation handoff.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: model-selection-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
task_class:
input_modalities:
output_modalities:
context_requirements:
latency_target:
cost_target:
privacy_or_residency_constraints:
provider_constraints:
candidate_models:
exclusion_reasons:
recommended_model_set:
routing_policy:
fallback_policy:
rollback_policy:
eval_requirements:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
